placements.note: Cumulative Housing First placements in England (pilot programme)

retentionRate.note: Housing retention rate at 2 years — percentage still housed

roughSleepers.note: Annual rough sleeper count, England (single-night snapshot)

sources.name: Ministry of Housing Communities and Local Government

metadata.methodology: Housing First placements from MHCLG evaluation of three large-scale pilots (West Midlands, Manchester, Liverpool). Retention rates from supported housing outcome monitoring. Rough sleeper count from annual MHCLG single-night snapshot count conducted in autumn. 2020 figure exceptionally low due to Everyone In emergency programme during COVID-19.
knownIssues: Pilot placements only — national implementation not yet underway in England
2020 rough sleeper count dramatically reduced by Everyone In emergency — not a sustained improvement
Retention rates from pilots may not generalise to less well-resourced implementations
